summary: Aligned hosted Cloudflare message routes with the generic Remote Candidate Exchange contract by returning remote_candidate response envelopes, accepting replay_key and generic finalize envelopes, preserving existing message/receipt compatibility fields, and adding route tests for accepted, malformed, duplicate, and unauthorized candidates.
residuals: The detailed task 1406 spec artifact was not present in docs/handoffs; implementation used the Remote Candidate Exchange outcome shape and preserved compatibility fields.
D1 schema versioning and receiving Site runtime admission proof remain later work.
